name: lorewire-video
description: Remotion project for LoreWire doodle shorts. Also hosts the Cloud Run render service (Phase 1 of _plans/2026-06-14-cloud-run-render.md).

scripts.//deploy comment: Auth via ADC (the --service-account flag attaches videocreator at the Cloud Run level; the SDK pulls fresh OAuth tokens from the metadata server). No PEM crypto inside Node, which sidesteps the OpenSSL 3 DECODER bug that broke the inline-credential path on node:22-slim. Env vars passed through: CRON_SECRET + GCS_BUCKET — that's it. 8 vCPU/16 GB sized for 1920x1080 renders to stay under Vercel's 800 s cron timeout (2 vCPU runs ~3-5 fps and busts the timeout on a 3700-frame envelope).
scripts.deploy:cloud-run: gcloud run deploy lorewire-render --source . --region ${CLOUD_RUN_REGION:-us-central1} --memory 16Gi --cpu 8 --timeout 3600 --no-allow-unauthenticated --service-account=videocreator@uplift-283910.iam.gserviceaccount.com --update-env-vars CRON_SECRET=$CRON_SECRET --update-env-vars GCS_BUCKET=$GCS_BUCKET
